sections.heading: Product Overview
sections.body: NarraTwin AI turns approved project knowledge into grounded walkthrough scripts.

sections.heading: Audience Coverage
sections.body: It supports recruiters, hiring managers, engineers, product leaders, customers, beginners, and global audiences with audience-aware explanations.

sections.heading: Local Provider Boundary
sections.body: The local demo uses mock local LLM, translation, voice, and avatar adapters for deterministic review.

sections.heading: Citation Requirement
sections.body: Every generated walkthrough claim must cite retrieved source chunks from approved knowledge.

sections.heading: Atlas Role
sections.body: Atlas Output OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 is a fictional local checklist builder for launch rehearsals.

sections.heading: Atlas Evidence
sections.body: Atlas Output OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 requires each generated checklist item to cite approved launch-note evidence.

sections.heading: Atlas Marker
sections.body: Atlas Output uses the marker OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 for output-correctness isolation checks.

sourceTranscriptSegments.sourceText: For global viewers, NarraTwin AI turns approved project knowledge into grounded walkthrough scripts. [1]

For global viewers, It supports recruiters, hiring managers, engineers, product leaders, customers, beginners, and global audiences with audience-aware explanations. Atlas Output OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 is a fictional local checklist builder for launch rehearsals. [2] [5]
For global viewers, The local demo uses mock local LLM, translation, voice, and avatar adapters for deterministic review. [3]
For global viewers, Every generated walkthrough claim must cite retrieved source chunks from approved knowledge. [4]
For engineers, Atlas Output OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 requires each generated checklist item to cite approved launch-note evidence. [6]
For engineers, Atlas Output uses the marker OUTPUT-SENTINEL-CP2 for output-correctness isolation checks. [7]

provenanceNotes: Synthetic public-safe corpus created for issue #278 only.
Contains no private strategy, private roadmap, invite code, real personal data, private media, provider payload, provider output, real media, or cloned identity material.
Uses fictional Atlas Output marker content and existing NarraTwin local/mock acceptance sentences.
Does not claim arbitrary-project translation quality or raw uploaded knowledge-document translation API coverage.
